name:
Showcase: Mix of API calls and browser network in the same test.
   Demonstrates that both response types produce the same rich exchange panel. > API and browser responses in same test > API call + browser navigation — both get exchange panels

testCase.fullName:
com.blockether.spel.http-report-test.Showcase: Mix of API calls and browser network in the same test.
   Demonstrates that both response types produce the same rich exchange panel..API and browser responses in same test.API call + browser navigation — both get exchange panels

descriptionHtml: Makes an API call via APIRequestContext AND a browser navigation, showing that both produce identical-looking rich HTML exchange panels. This is the key showcase: one consistent experience regardless of whether the HTTP call was from the API layer or the browser.
